description: A minimal workflow MVP that connects several small Workflow Nodes to answer one outfit recommendation request.
default_query: 다음 주에 칭다오 여행 가는데 옷 추천해줘

agents.name: Request Parser Node
agents.role: Extract city, date, user and intent from the user request.

agents.name: Question Node
agents.role: Detect missing context (purpose or style) and decide whether clarification is needed.

agents.name: Weather Tool Node
agents.role: Call the weather tool and normalize weather data.

agents.name: Shopping History Analysis Node
agents.role: Load purchase history and analyze user style preferences.

agents.name: Recommendation Node
agents.role: Match weather and shopping analysis with recommendation rules.

agents.name: Compose Node
agents.role: Render the final answer with the configured output template.

question_agent.clarification_message: 정보가 부족합니다. 여행 목적과 선호 스타일을 알려주세요. (예: 출장 / 캐주얼 등)

clarification_questions.city: 어느 도시나 여행지를 기준으로 추천할까요? (예: 서울, 칭다오)
clarification_questions.date: 언제 입을 옷인가요? (예: 내일, 다음 주)
clarification_questions.purpose_or_style: 여행/출근/데이트 같은 목적이나 캐주얼/포멀 같은 선호 스타일을 알려주세요.
